headline: Pool (POOL) Was Dropped From Russell Growth Indexes, So What Changes Now?
summary: Pool Corporation (NasdaqGS:POOL) was removed from several major Russell growth indices, including benchmarks such as the Russell 1000 Growth, Russell 2500 Growth, Russell 3000 Growth, and Russell Midcap Growth. These changes took effect as part of the latest Russell index reconstitution, resulting in simultaneous exclusions from multiple growth-focused benchmarks. Pool Corporation is a large distributor of swimming pool supplies, equipment, and related leisure products, with customers that...

headline: Pool (POOL) Could Be 37% Undervalued After Russell Growth Index Removal
summary: What Pool stock’s index removal means for investors Pool (POOL) has been removed from several Russell Growth benchmarks, including the Russell 1000 Growth and Russell 3000 Growth indexes, a rebalancing move that can influence trading flows and institutional positioning. For you as an investor, index removal often matters less for what it says about the underlying business and more for how it affects who holds the stock. Index funds tracking these benchmarks typically adjust their portfolios...
